title: Urbananthus critoniformis
taxonomy: Urbananthus critoniformis is classified within the family Annonaceae and is part of the genus Urbananthus. It belongs to the kingdom Plantae, further classified into the clade Angiosperms. The species is also classified within the phylum Tracheophyta and the clade Magnoliophyta. Urbananthus critoniformis is a flowering plant native to the Americas, and its classification reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Annonaceae family. More specifically, its classification within the genus Urbananthus is thought to be closely related to the genus Cremastosperma.
